title: Compose view component for displaying tool call results and progress
purpose: Renders a structured view of tool call data including title, body, progress text, and output details like branch, commit, and PR information.
module_context: Exports a React functional component named ComposeView that accepts an item prop of type AgentToolCallItem and displays various parts of the tool call data based on its status and content.

steps.content: Extract the input data from the tool call item and initialize default values for title, body, and draft flags.
Join all progress chunks into a single text string for display.
Parse and validate the tool call output if the status is not running.
Extract and format the commit SHA for display if present.
Render the title section if a title exists, including draft indicator.
Render the body section if body content exists.
Render the progress text section if progress exists.
Render the output details section including branch, commit, and PR information if output exists.
Render the error message section if an error exists.
